description.en: The<a>SVGelement creates a hyperlink to other web pages, files, locations in the same page, email addresses, or any other URL. It is very similar to HTML's<a>element.

excerpt.es: The<a>SVGelement creates a hyperlink to other web pages, files, locations in the same page, email addresses, or any other URL. It is very similar to HTML's<a>element.
excerpt.en: The<a>SVGelement creates a hyperlink to other web pages, files, locations in the same page, email addresses, or any other URL. It is very similar to HTML's<a>element.

description.en: The<animate>SVGelement provides a way to animate an attribute of an element over time.

excerpt.es: The<animate>SVGelement provides a way to animate an attribute of an element over time.
excerpt.en: The<animate>SVGelement provides a way to animate an attribute of an element over time.

description.en: The<animateMotion>SVGelement provides a way to define how an element moves along a motion path.

excerpt.es: The<animateMotion>SVGelement provides a way to define how an element moves along a motion path.
excerpt.en: The<animateMotion>SVGelement provides a way to define how an element moves along a motion path.

description.en: The<animateTransform>SVGelement animates a transformation attribute on its target element, thereby allowing animations to control translation, scaling, rotation, and/or skewing.

excerpt.es: The<animateTransform>SVGelement animates a transformation attribute on its target element, thereby allowing animations to control translation, scaling, rotation, and/or skewing.
excerpt.en: The<animateTransform>SVGelement animates a transformation attribute on its target element, thereby allowing animations to control translation, scaling, rotation, and/or skewing.
